---
title: "Reflection"
---

## What I Learned

Throughout this module, I learned:

- How to use Quarto for creating websites
- Python programming for data analysis
- Version control with Git
- Publishing on GitHub Pages

## Challenges Faced

- Setting up the environment
- Debugging code

::: {.callout-warning}
## Warning
Avoid common mistakes like uploading files manually.
:::

## Future Plans

I plan to continue developing my skills in [areas].

### Equation

$$ E = mc^2 $$

### Mermaid Diagram

```{mermaid}
graph TD;
    A-->B;
    A-->C;
    B-->D;
    C-->D;
```

### Embedded Video

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ >}}
